ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "review_category" TEXT /* Category of the event review */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the event */,
  "presenter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the presenter */,
  "audience" INTEGER /* Target audience of the event */,
  "waiting_list_registrations" INTEGER /* Number of waiting list registrations */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Type of the event */,
  "date_format" TEXT /* Format of the date */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees the event can accommodate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link for users to register for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_audience FOREIGN KEY ("audience") REFERENCES audiences ("audience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_presenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("presenter_id") REFERENCES presenters ("presenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presenters" (
  "presenter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presenter */,
  "presenter_name" TEXT /* Name of the presenter */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the presenter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the presenter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the presenter */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website or personal page of the presenter */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the presenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audiences" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience */,
  "audience_name" TEXT /* Name of the audience */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audience */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the target audience */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the target audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the event (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review of the event */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., attendee, presenter, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being registered for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user registering */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the registration was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_registrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waiting_lists" (
  "waiting_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waiting list registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event with a waiting list */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user on the waiting list */,
  "waiting_list_date" TEXT /* Date the waiting list registration was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the waiting list registration (e.g., active, moved to registration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waiting_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waiting_lists_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waiting_lists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., event reminder, registration confirmation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category, allowing for hierarchical categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tags_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reviews_categories" (
  "review_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review category */,
  "review_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the review category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the review category */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_category_id")
)
